issues.title: Adding SpEL TemplateFormat and make it as default
issues.body:
It's better to reduce third-party libraries, I suggest to make SpEL `TemplateFormat` as default, then dependency `org.antlr:stringtemplate` is optional. I'd like to contribute if the team accept the proposal.

Here is prototype: https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/compare/main...quaff:spring-ai:patch-2?expand=1
